クラス RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation

java.lang.Object
mechanics.optimization.RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation
含まれているクラス:
RotationSearcher
private static class RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation extends Object
Encapsulates a single (order, profiles) combination to be evaluated in the parallel stream. Each instance runs an independent 25-second simulation.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • RunnableEvaluation

      public RunnableEvaluation(Supplier<CombatSimulator> factory, List<CharacterId> order, Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile> profiles)
      パラメータ:
      factory - supplier for a fresh simulator
      order - cast order for this evaluation
      profiles - per-character profile selection for this evaluation

  • メソッドの詳細

    • evaluate

      public RotationSearcher.RotationPlan evaluate()
      Runs the simulation and returns a RotationSearcher.RotationPlan with the total damage accumulated.

      Before the main loop all characters are given full energy so burst availability is not the bottleneck in the first cycle. Each iteration of the loop swaps to the next character in order, executes that character's full action profile sequence, and advances to the next character. A minimal time advance guards against infinite loops when no action advances the clock.

      戻り値:
      evaluation result containing total damage

    • processAction

      private void processAction(Character active, ProfileAction command, CombatSimulator sim, double maxTime)
      Dispatches a single action command string to the active character.

      Recognised commands:

      • SKILL – uses the character's elemental skill if off cooldown.
      • BURST – uses the elemental burst if energy is full.
      • ATTACK – executes one normal attack.
      • ATTACK_UNTIL_END – repeatedly attacks while the burst window is active, then performs 3 more attacks if the burst window has closed.
      パラメータ:
      active - the currently on-field character
      command - the action command string (case-insensitive)
      sim - the running simulator
      maxTime - simulation end time; used to abort ATTACK_UNTIL_END

    • isBurstActive

      private boolean isBurstActive(Character character, double currentTime)
